title: A Pilot Research Note on Conversational Stance in Large Language Models
summary: A lightweight research-note example for testing the publishing workflow. The project keeps code, PDF, and optional discussion links together while leaving DOI and slides as optional milestone artifacts.
abstract: This dummy record demonstrates the publishing workflow for a lightweight research note. Replace it with a real project after the template is ready. The generated detail page includes citation metadata when a research PDF is available, plus links to code, versions, and discussion.

versions.label: v0.1
versions.note: Workflow demonstration with a simple PDF report.
